## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] `just ci-tier2` (or equivalent scoped checks)

## Reproducibility impact

- [ ] No reproducibility-impacting changes
- [ ] Reproducibility behavior changed and documented in `docs/`

## Documentation

- [ ] Docs updated (if needed)
- [ ] Evaluator cards updated (if needed)
